goal: Add a side-effect-free evidence pack builder for BPK-085 runtime patch permit-prep metadata, requiring evidence and reviewer refs while keeping permit issuance, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, runtime execution, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not issue permits, apply runtime patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, run runtime execution, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Runtime patch permit-prep metadata can be bundled as operator-review evidence without issuing a permit.
Evidence and reviewer refs are required for ready status.
Runtime execution remains false and disallowed.
assumptions: Actual permit issuance, patch application, and execution require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing evidence ref, and blocked permit-prep cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit issuance, runtime patch application, server mutation, route mutation, runtime execution, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-085 prepared runtime patch permit request metadata without issuing a permit or enabling execution.
